notes: Converted from the old chapter extraction schema.
Hidden facts, motives, and faction pressures require living-world re-extraction.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package contains mostly public/visible events (travel, killing, entering time river) and internal thoughts of Fang Yuan (planning to obtain Ding Xian You, using soul-burning luck move). No clearly hidden facts with direct source support for who knows vs who doesn't know. The internal thoughts about Red Lotus Demon Venerable's true inheritance and the Four Xunzi are visible to the reader but not clearly hidden from specific actors. No private knowledge, future-known information, or secret motives/plans with sufficient source-backed whoKnows/whoDoesNotKnow distinction.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package contains mostly factual events (travel, kills, cultivation actions) but lacks direct behavioral descriptions from which a clear observedMotive can be derived. For example, 方源思考如何谋取定仙游蛊 (thinking about how to obtain Ding Xian You Gu) is an internal thought, not an observed action. The kills of 蒙屠 and 睡姑 are stated as done but without observed context showing the motive. No clear observed behavior with unambiguous motive inference is available.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

insufficient source-backed seed: The seed primarily follows Fang Yuan (方源) as an individual actor. While he leads the Shadow Sect remnants (影宗残余蛊仙), the seed facts focus on his personal actions (killing Meng Tu and Shui Gu, capturing Jun Shenguang, entering the river of time, plotting to obtain Ding Xian You Gu). No collective stake or group pressure is directly described in the seed. The Shadow Sect remnants (影无邪, 妙音仙子, 白兔姑娘) are mentioned only as accompanying Fang Yuan and entering his aperture to cultivate — no faction-level pressure, threat, or interest is evident. The only named group is 琅琊派 (Langya Sect) via spy Mao Liu, but no pressure on that group is described. 四旬子 (Four Xunzi) of 灵蝶谷 (Spirit Butterfly Valley) appear briefly but only as observers noticing something — no faction pressure. No source-backed faction/group pressure candidate can be extracted.
IF export filter quarantined 8 legacy old-schema branches.
